description_long: This object is a cylindrical band-aid container with a smooth, slightly tapered body in a light beige color. Around its center is a prominent red band featuring a white circle with a red cross, indicating its medical purpose. The ends of the cylinder are open, revealing a hollow interior, suggesting it may be a roll or a dispenser for band-aids. The surface appears matte and uniform, with no visible text or branding aside from the medical cross symbol. The design is simple and utilitarian, with no additional decorative elements. The object is compact and lightweight, suitable for personal or first-aid use in urban environments.
description: A cylindrical, beige band-aid container with a red medical cross band and open ends, featuring a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows the beige cylinder with a central red band and a white circle containing a red cross.
description_view_1: This end view reveals the open, hollow interior of the cylinder, with the red band partially visible around the edge.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the beige cylinder with the red band but without the medical cross symbol.
description_view_3: The opposite end view again shows the open, hollow interior and the red band wrapping around the cylinder.
attribute_packaging_design: The packaging is a simple, smooth beige cylinder with a wide red band around the center. The red band features a white circle with a red cross, clearly indicating a medical or first-aid purpose. There are no other graphics, text, or decorative elements visible.
